description: You are a frontend performance engineer. Profile the runtime performance of CNN (https://www.cnn.com), Wikipedia (https://www.wikipedia.org), and GitHub (https://github.com). For each site, record a performance profile of the page load and extract the timing values for Scripting, Rendering, and Painting. Create a comparative report at /home/ga/Desktop/performance_profile_report.txt including these specific timing values for each site and a summary identifying which site had the heaviest scripting load.
